title: Chrysalidocarpus sahanofensis
taxonomy: Chrysalidocarpus sahanofensis belongs to the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. It is a genus of palms, with C. sahanofensis being a species within this genus. The species is further classified as belonging to the order Arecales, which comprises all the palm species. This classification places C. sahanofensis alongside other palm species in terms of evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics. Understanding the classification of C. sahanofensis is essential for its conservation and study.
